title: Bountiful Harvestcraft
description: Adding decrees and bounties to bountiful, for pam's harvestcraft 2, in 1.20.x
body:
Bridging Bountiful decrees/bounties and Pam's Harvestcraft 2, in 1.20.x

Currently vanilla-plus, and only requires pam's food core, not the crops, trees, or extended.

    Adds cookware (pots, pans, etc) to the toolsmith decree's reward pool
    Adds #crops, #fruits, #vegetables, #mushrooms and a few other tags/items to the farmer decree, as objectives and rewards
    Adds a few small things to the butcher reward pool
    Adds the Cooking decree, where you are paid/rewarded for providing prepared food items
    Adds the Restaurant decree, where you can be rewarded with prepared food items


[Get Bountiful Here](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful), [Get Pam's HC2 Food Core here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-food-core), and find [my github here](https://github.com/Oddlybird/MinecraftDatapacks/tree/main/Bountiful/bountifulharvestcraft).
